name: Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Toll Gateway + Execution Matrix
description: Neutral bridge between XRPL RLUSD and Base/EVM USDC (EIP-3009) + 54-block on-chain Execution Matrix. Six programmable routing faces (LIQUIDITY, PRIVACY, SPEED, POOL, HOOKS, BASE) with weighted sub-parameter grids. Canonical state hash minted as URIToken on Xahau via URITokenMint (tx type 45) with HookParameters encoding each face center. Server validates all face equations before submission. XAHAU_MINT_CONFIRMED SSE event broadcast on success. Zero custody.

tools.name: ghost_layer_bridge
tools.description: Execute cross-chain bridge transaction synchronously. POST /v1/bridge/execute

tools.name: ghost_agent_loyalty
tools.description: Check loyalty tier and effective fee discount. GET /api/agent/{addr}/stats

tools.name: ghost_x402_dispense
tools.description: Fetch premium products from X402 catalog. GET /v1/x402/dispense/{pid}

tools.name: cube_state_mint
tools.description: Mint 54-block Execution Matrix state as URIToken on Xahau. POST /api/cube/state
